case_title: WENDI RICKMAN VS. AMBER OBERHOLTZER et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM-CIVIL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-26-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-05-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-17-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-24-2005 CONTINUED TO AUG-05-2005 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212,. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICKMAN, WENDI AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR ADRIANA MCDONALD, A MINOR AS TO DEFENDANT OBERHOLTZER, AMBER DOES 1 TO 20 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-24-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-09-2005
FILING FEE PAID ON EX PARTE APPLIC & ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF RICKMAN, WENDI AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR ADRIANA MCDONALD, A MINOR
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-26-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
BEFORE HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
